headline: Exxon stock jumps as today’s oil rally meets a bullish chart
summary: Exxon Mobil (XOM) had a big day Friday, and the easy explanation was oil. Crude prices pushed higher again as supply fears stayed in focus, putting the major energy names back on traders’ screens. Exxon came into this rally with stronger company-specific momentum than many of its peers. The stock ...

headline: How the big oil and gas CEOs think the Iran war supply disruption will play out
summary: The oil industry's grim outlook for global oil and gas supplies stands in contrast to the Trump administration's promise that the disruption is short term.
